isi.lyrics:
Lyric soowoo - With You (feat. sido)

Romanization

yeah, When we’re old and gray
And the time will go by
Even if the world around us will change
I still love the way you call out my name
One to ten, perfect to me

I will stay here right beside of you
Finally I know what I want to say

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you
Every day, every night
Everything’s gon' be alright
Cause I’m still in love with you
babe, I’m still in love with you

We are dancing in the dark
Underneath the moonlight
Even if the music stops playing now
I will always find a way to your heart
You are all I'll ever need

I will stay here right beside of you
Finally I know what I want to say

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you
Every day, every night
Everything’s gon' be alright
Cause I’m still in love with you
babe, I’m still in love with you

I’m still right here with you
I’m still fallin' once again

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you
Every day, every night
Everything’s gon' be alright
Cause I’m still in love with you
babe, I’m still in love with you

Hangeul

yeah, When we’re old and gray
And the time will go by
Even if the world around us will change
I still love the way you call out my name
One to ten, perfect to me

I will stay here right beside of you
Finally I know what I want to say

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you
Every day, every night
Everything’s gon' be alright
Cause I’m still in love with you
babe, I’m still in love with you

We are dancing in the dark
Underneath the moonlight
Even if the music stops playing now
I will always find a way to your heart
You are all I'll ever need

I will stay here right beside of you
Finally I know what I want to say

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you
Every day, every night
Everything’s gon' be alright
Cause I’m still in love with you
babe, I’m still in love with you

I’m still right here with you
I’m still fallin' once again

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you

I’m still in love with you
I’m still in love with you
Every day, every night
Everything’s gon' be alright
Cause I’m still in love with you
babe, I’m still in love with you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric DEUX - 또 하루 (Another Day)

Romanization

tto haruga jinaganda
naegeseo tteonagan neocheoreom
eolmangkeum jinaya naneun apahaji aneulkka
eolmangkeum apaya nan gwaenchanajilkka

ajikdo nae maeumsogen
neomudo nega maneunde
idaero nan eotteokhaeya hae

amuri meon gireul tteonagado
dorabomyeon gateun jariinggeol
neoreul miwohae bwado neoreul wommanghae bwado
an doena bwa honja namgyeojin naega apa

tto haruga beoryeojinda
ijen sanggwan eopseojin nacheoreom
eolmangkeum jinaya neoreul jiul suga isseulkka
eolmangkeum jiwoya nega sarajilkka

ajikdo nae maeumsogen
modeun ge sangcheoppuninde
idaero nan eotteokhaeya hae

amuri meon gireul tteonagado
dorabomyeon gateun jariinggeol
neoreul miwohae bwado neoreul wommanghae bwado
an doena bwa honja namgyeojin chaeron

amuri meon gireul tteonagado
na dorabomyeon gateun jari geudaeroinggeol
neoreul miwohae bwado neoreul wommanghae bwado
an doena bwa honja namgyeojin naega apa

nan eotteokhaeya hae


Hangeul

또 하루가 지나간다
나에게서 떠나간 너처럼
얼만큼 지나야 나는 아파하지 않을까
얼만큼 아파야 난 괜찮아질까

아직도 내 마음속엔
너무도 네가 많은데
이대로 난 어떡해야 해

아무리 먼 길을 떠나가도
돌아보면 같은 자리인걸
너를 미워해 봐도 너를 원망해 봐도
안 되나 봐 혼자 남겨진 내가 아파

또 하루가 버려진다
이젠 상관 없어진 나처럼
얼만큼 지나야 너를 지울 수가 있을까
얼만큼 지워야 네가 사라질까

아직도 내 마음속엔
모든 게 상처뿐인데
이대로 난 어떡해야 해

아무리 먼 길을 떠나가도
돌아보면 같은 자리인걸
너를 미워해 봐도 너를 원망해 봐도
안 되나 봐 혼자 남겨진 채론

아무리 먼 길을 떠나가도
나 돌아보면 같은 자리 그대로인걸
너를 미워해 봐도 너를 원망해 봐도
안 되나 봐 혼자 남겨진 내가 아파

난 어떡해야 해
